name: Kimi K2.5
archDisplay: 1T-parameter MoE, 32B active/token, 384 experts (8 routed + 1 shared), 61 layers (1 dense), MLA attention, 160K vocab, SwiGLU; native multimodal via 400M-param MoonViT vision encoder
note: Predecessor to Kimi K2.6 (whose own docs explicitly call it 'Successor to K2.5'); Moonshot's first native-multimodal flagship, built via continual pretraining atop Kimi-K2-Base on ~15T mixed vision+text tokens. Introduced native image/video understanding and the 'Agent Swarm' research-preview multi-agent orchestration (self-directed, up to 100 sub-agents, ~1,500 coordinated tool-call steps), trained with Parallel-Agent Reinforcement Learning (PARL). Vendor claims near-frontier coding/reasoning/vision performance versus GPT-5.2 and Claude Opus 4.5-class closed models; independent Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index score was 38/100 (v4.1 methodology, ranked #14/95 open+closed models at time of measurement), corroborating strong but not universally frontier-topping performance. As of July 2026 it has been superseded as Moonshot's flagship by K2.6 but remains live and served via Moonshot's own API (platform.moonshot.ai) and third-party hosts (OpenRouter, Fireworks, etc.).
